g.text: METHODOLOGY: ZCS-6 (Phase 6 closed) · BENCHMARK: VBX-ISPS-BENCH v1.1 · SUBSTRATE: v0.2-α
PHRONESIS-M · pressure garment + PLSS · Mars-class envelope
① HELMET — bubble + sun visor + lights · HF-11 interop
② SHOULDER BEARING — 360° rotation · HF-3 cycle
③ SUIT-PORT MATING RING — HF-11 habitat i/f
④ WAIST BEARING — HF-3 cycle life ≥250 EVAs
⑤ HIP JOINT — partial-gravity mobility · Z-2 heritage
⑥ KNEE JOINT — 14 powered/passive joints total
⑦ BOOT — dust seal · HF-5 ≤50 g/EVA
PLSS backpack visible · suit-port hang point
① OUTER COVER PANEL · composite shell · MMOD shielding
② THERMAL CONTROL · ~750 g/h H2O sublimation peak
③ O2/CO2 LOOP · amine-swing-bed primary, LiOH backup
NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX · 16 GB · shielded enclosure · 2 kg
④ PHRONESIS CORE · the IP moat
Li-ion · 1200 Wh · 28 V · BMS · PMU · DC/DC
⑥ SENSOR MANIFOLD · biomed + PLSS telemetry · IMU + GNSS
⑦ SUIT-PORT PLATE · habitat-side mating · HF-11 interop
Every safety-critical decision attempt produces a signed Aletheia chain entry. Append-every-attempt; HF-8 VERIFIED v0.2-α.
Hard safety floors (hypoxia, hypercapnia, depressurization, sensor faults) are deterministic. LLM cannot override emergencies. HF-9 VERIFIED.
Substrate compute consolidation (~2 kg) drops total suit mass below xEMU baseline. PLAUSIBLE planning estimate; final masses set by shell partner.
Mercury kernel WCET informal proof (5-cycle deterministic). Lean 4 machine-checkable proof is v0.2-β NEXT work item. VERIFIED informal · SPECULATIVE machine-checked.
HF-12 autonomy ratio currently demonstrated with sandbox model (Qwen2.5-0.5B). Production validation requires Mistral-7B + calibration audit (v0.3).
Shell scope (HF-1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 11) deferred to v1.2 with hardware partner. SPECULATIVE pending partner agreement (ILC Dover / Collins Aerospace / equivalent).
SKETCH ONLY — NOT FOR MANUFACTURE. Industrial design, EMC, FMEA repair simulation, accelerated EVA-cycle life test,
dust simulant chamber test, accelerator beam test, RF certification, and underwriter dry-run not in scope of this drawing.
